name: Reliance Bank
description_short: Reliance Bank is a Minnesota-based community bank offering personal and business banking products, mortgages, and technology-enabled financial services with local branch presence in Faribault.
description_long:
Reliance Bank opened on August 13, 2007, in Faribault, Minnesota, as a state-chartered, FDIC-insured full-service bank. Founded with nine employees, the bank quickly earned the Faribault Area Chamber of Commerce 'New Business Spotlight' award after its first full year of operation. The bank has since grown into an established financial services provider with expanded staffing to serve its community.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of personal banking products including checking and savings accounts, debit cards with tap-to-pay functionality, and Zelle money transfer services. For business customers, Reliance Bank provides dedicated business banking accounts and services designed to support growth. The bank also offers mortgage loans for purchase, refinance, and construction scenarios with competitive rates. Additional services include online banking platforms for both personal and business accounts, ATM access, credit cards, and ID theft protection through ID TheftSmart.

Reliance Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on community banking and personalized service. The bank positions itself as 'reimagining community banking' with a local approach, promising responses to customer questions that 'make sense for you, right here, right now.' The organization prioritizes technology integration alongside relationship-based banking, particularly for small business customers. Their commitment to the Faribault community and focus on efficient, profitable, and enjoyable banking experiences set them apart from larger national institutions.

As a community bank with a single location, Reliance Bank's primary limitation is geographic accessibility—customers must be in or near Faribault, Minnesota to fully benefit from in-person services. While they offer robust online and digital services, the bank does not appear to have multiple branch locations, which may limit convenience for customers in other regions. Rates and product competitiveness are not detailed on their website, requiring direct contact for comparison. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: ID TheftSmart fraud protection and identity theft monitoring
Lost or stolen card reporting and replacement
pros: FDIC-insured, state-chartered bank providing full deposit protection
Tap-to-pay debit cards available for modern payment convenience
Zelle integration for fast, free peer-to-peer money transfers
ID TheftSmart fraud protection and identity theft monitoring included
Mortgage products with competitive rates for purchase, refinance, and construction
Dedicated business banking accounts with focus on small business relationships
24/7 fraud reporting line (1-833-337-6075) for lost or stolen cards
Online banking platform for both personal and business account management
cons: Single physical location in Faribault, Minnesota limits accessibility for non-local customers
Website lacks specific APR, interest rates, and fee information for products
No evidence of multiple branch locations or nationwide ATM network beyond 'Find an ATM' function
Limited details on business loan types, SBA lending, or commercial credit products
No mention of mobile app functionality despite emphasis on technology
best_for: Individuals and families living in or near Faribault, Minnesota seeking personalized community banking
Small business owners wanting relationship-based banking with local decision-making
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured deposits and fraud protection over national bank convenience
Homebuyers and refinancing borrowers in the Faribault area seeking mortgage services
diagnosis: Reliance Bank is best for individuals and small businesses in Faribault, Minnesota seeking FDIC-insured community banking with personalized service and fraud protection. The main caveat is geographic limitation—the single physical location makes this bank impractical for customers outside the Faribault area, though online banking partially mitigates this constraint.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Reliance Bank is a Minnesota community bank offering personal and business banking, mortgages, and digital financial services.
